---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: references.bib
nocite: |
  @*
csl: apa.csl
---

Below is a list of my published work. For working papers and works in progress, 
see the [Research](research.qmd) page.

::: {.section-title}
Peer-Reviewed Articles
:::

::: {#refs}
:::

---

::: {.section-title}
Other Writing
:::

- **[Title]**. *[Outlet, e.g., The Monkey Cage / Policy Brief / Book Chapter]*. [Year]. [<a href="#">Link</a>]

---

*Last updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %Y")`*
